# Lowcountry Guns & Range

> Canonical site: https://lcguns.com/

## Summary

Indoor shooting range and pro shop in Hardeeville, SC (I-95 Exit 5). Public range, 170+ rentals, CWP and defensive training, memberships, transfers, and retail.

## Key facts

- Address: 98 Purrysburg Rd, Hardeeville, SC 29927
- Phone: 843-784-5474
- Service area: Savannah / Pooler GA; Hilton Head / Bluffton SC; Beaufort SC; Hardeeville SC

## Policies

- Range rules, dress code, and pricing: https://lcguns.com/faq and https://lcguns.com/the-range
- Digital waiver before visit: https://lcguns.com/waiver
- Privacy: https://lcguns.com/privacy-policy

## Optional

Contact form: https://lcguns.com/contact
